requirement_topic.en: ESDM Rooftop PLTS Regulation and PLN 50 Hz Grid Connection
requirement_topic.zh: ESDM 屋顶 PLTS 规章与 PLN 50 Hz 并网
requirement_topic.zht: ESDM 屋頂 PLTS 規章與 PLN 50 Hz 併網

summary.en: Indonesia rooftop solar projects connected to the network of a holder of an electricity supply business licence for public interest are governed by the ESDM rooftop PLTS regulation. Permen ESDM No. 2 Tahun 2024 removed the net-metering/export-import credit scheme: excess energy exported to PLN is now valued at Rp 0, shifting the economics toward 100% self-consumption. For projects connected to PLN, the inverter must be documented for the project application, installed capacity approval, metering and operation arrangement, and Indonesian 50 Hz grid settings used by PLN.
summary.zh: 接入公共利益电力供应业务许可证持有人电网的印度尼西亚屋顶太阳能项目受 ESDM 屋顶 PLTS 规章管理。Permen ESDM No. 2 Tahun 2024 已取消净计量/出口-进口抵扣机制：向 PLN 反送的多余电量现按 Rp 0 计价，项目经济性转向 100% 自发自用。对于接入 PLN 的项目，逆变器必须为项目申请、装机容量批准、计量和运行安排，以及 PLN 使用的印度尼西亚 50 Hz 电网参数提供文件。
summary.zht: 接入公共利益電力供應業務許可證持有人電網的印尼屋頂太陽能項目受 ESDM 屋頂 PLTS 規章管理。Permen ESDM No. 2 Tahun 2024 已取消淨計量/出口-進口抵扣機制：向 PLN 反送的多餘電量現按 Rp 0 計價，專案經濟性轉向 100% 自發自用。對於接入 PLN 的專案，逆變器必須為專案申請、裝機容量批准、計量和運行安排，以及 PLN 使用的印尼 50 Hz 電網參數提供文件。

standards_or_laws: Peraturan Menteri ESDM No. 2 Tahun 2024 on rooftop solar power plants connected to the electricity network of public-interest electricity supply business licence holders
PLN project-specific interconnection, metering, commissioning, and operating requirements
Indonesia 50 Hz grid-frequency settings for connected equipment

summary.en: China grid-connection evidence under GB/T 19964, GB/T 37408, NB/T 32004, State Grid, or China Southern Power Grid procedures can support engineering review but does not substitute for ESDM rooftop PLTS compliance or PLN project approval.
summary.zh: 依据 GB/T 19964、GB/T 37408、NB/T 32004、国家电网或南方电网流程形成的中国并网证据可支持工程审查，但不能替代 ESDM 屋顶 PLTS 合规或 PLN 项目批准。
summary.zht: 依據 GB/T 19964、GB/T 37408、NB/T 32004、國家電網或南方電網流程形成的中國併網證據可支持工程審查，但不能替代 ESDM 屋頂 PLTS 合規或 PLN 專案批准。

gap.en: The main gap is project approval, grid settings, and self-consumption design rather than factory safety testing alone. Because exported surplus energy is valued at Rp 0 under the current rooftop PLTS rule, exporters should prepare Indonesian-language model data, single-line diagrams, firmware setting ranges, frequency and voltage protection tables, metering compatibility, export-limiting or load-management evidence where used, and commissioning evidence for the PLN file.
gap.zh: 主要差距在项目批准、电网参数和自发自用设计，而不只是工厂安全测试。由于现行屋顶 PLTS 规则下反送剩余电量按 Rp 0 计价，出口商应准备印尼语型号资料、单线图、固件参数范围、频率和电压保护表、计量兼容性、如采用的限发或负载管理证据，以及投运证据，以供 PLN 文件使用。
gap.zht: 主要差距在專案批准、電網參數和自發自用設計，而不只是工廠安全測試。由於現行屋頂 PLTS 規則下反送剩餘電量按 Rp 0 計價，出口商應準備印尼語型號資料、單線圖、韌體參數範圍、頻率和電壓保護表、計量相容性、如採用的限發或負載管理證據，以及投運證據，以供 PLN 文件使用。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory for rooftop PLTS projects that connect to the covered public electricity network; PLN acceptance is project-specific, does not transfer from a China grid certificate, and export-import credit is no longer available under Permen ESDM No. 2 Tahun 2024
mandatory_status.cn: Not equivalent — China grid-code compliance does not authorize Indonesian rooftop PLTS interconnection

source.publisher: Kementerian Energi dan Sumber Daya Mineral (ESDM)

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Treat ESDM rooftop PLTS compliance and PLN 50 Hz interconnection as project approval gates separate from product-level inverter test reports; model the project for 100% self-consumption because exported excess energy is valued at Rp 0.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 应将 ESDM 屋顶 PLTS 合规和 PLN 50 Hz 并网视为独立于产品级逆变器测试报告的项目批准门槛；因反送多余电量按 Rp 0 计价，应按 100% 自发自用进行项目测算。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 應將 ESDM 屋頂 PLTS 合規和 PLN 50 Hz 併網視為獨立於產品級逆變器測試報告的專案批准門檻；因反送多餘電量按 Rp 0 計價，應按 100% 自發自用進行專案測算。
